ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location this precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_code" TEXT /* Code identifier for the precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "district" TEXT /* Election district the precinct belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballot_groups" (
  "ballot_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot group */,
  "group_code" TEXT /* Code for the ballot group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ballot group */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election associated with the ballot group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the registration */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct of the registration */,
  "registration_count" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "voter_category" TEXT /* Category of voter (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registrations_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registrations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots_cast" (
  "ballot_cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballots cast record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the ballots were cast */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the ballots were cast */,
  "ballot_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ballot group */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of voting (Polling Place, VBM Portion, Total) */,
  "ballots_cast_count" INTEGER /* Number of ballots cast */,
  "reporting_status" TEXT /* Reporting status of the ballots (e.g., Reported, Unreported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_ballot_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ballot_group_id") REFERENCES ballot_groups ("ballot_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office the candidate is running for */,
  "running_mate" TEXT /* Name of the running mate (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate voted for */,
  "ballot_cast_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ballot cast record */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "vote_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_ballot_cast_id FOREIGN KEY ("ballot_cast_id") REFERENCES ballots_cast ("ballot_cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the election official (e.g., Administrator, Supervisor) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the official */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes_by_mail" (
  "vbm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote-by-mail record */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter registration record */,
  "mailed_date" TEXT /* Date when the ballot was mailed */,
  "returned_date" TEXT /* Date when the ballot was returned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mail ballot (e.g., Sent, Returned) */,
  "ballot_status" TEXT /* Status of the ballot (e.g., Counted, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vbm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_by_mail_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES voter_registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballot_types" (
  "ballot_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ballot type (e.g., Mail-In, In-Person) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ballot type */,
  "ballot_format" TEXT /* Format of the ballot (e.g., Paper, Electronic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election date record */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for voter registration */,
  "early_voting_start" TEXT /* Start date of early voting */,
  "early_voting_end" TEXT /* End date of early voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action took place */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "table_modified" TEXT /* Name of the table that was modified */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, official) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting history record */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter registration record */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "voted" INTEGER /* Whether the voter cast a ballot in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_history_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES voter_registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter registration record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES voter_registrations ("registration_id")
)
